message:
feat(codegen): Complete os.zig migration to withInlineBlock callback pattern

Migrated all 28 inline blocks in os.zig to the new callback pattern:
- ✓ Automatic semicolon handling (no more double ;;)
- ✓ Cannot forget to close blocks (compiler enforced)
- ✓ Label management is automatic
- ✓ Type-safe context passing via closure

Functions migrated:
- genListdir, genGetenv, genRename, genStat, genChmod, genAccess
- genTruncate, genKill, genSystem, genRead, genOpen, genPipe
- genFdopen, genUrandom, genWalk, genScandir, genSymlink
- genReadlink, genIslink
- genPathExists, genPathIsdir, genPathIsfile, genPathAbspath
- genPathJoin, genPathSplit, genPathSplitext, genPathGetsize
- pathBlock helper (comptime)
- osSwitch helper (comptime)

Total: 28 inline blocks eliminated, 0 remain in os.zig
Build: ✓ passing
